title: Project Manager
description: Lead and manage construction projects from inception to completion. Coordinate with clients, consultants, and site teams to deliver projects on time and within budget.
requirements: Minimum 5 years experience in construction project management. Degree in Civil Engineering or related field. Strong leadership and communication skills.

title: Quantity Surveyor
description: Manage project costs and budgets, prepare Bills of Quantities, and evaluate contractor claims and variations for ongoing construction projects.
requirements: Degree in Quantity Surveying or related field. Minimum 3 years experience. Proficient in AutoCAD and QS software.

title: Site Engineer
description: Supervise day-to-day site construction activities, ensuring compliance with drawings, specifications, and safety standards. Coordinate with subcontractors and suppliers.
requirements: Degree in Civil Engineering. Fresh graduates welcome. Willingness to work on-site. Strong problem-solving skills.

title: Safety Officer (SHASSIC Certified)
description: Implement and monitor safety, health, and environmental policies on construction sites. Conduct risk assessments and safety audits to ensure compliance with DOSH regulations.
requirements: Green Book holder (SHO). Minimum 3 years experience in construction HSE. SHASSIC experience is an advantage.

title: Accounts Executive
description: Handle full set of accounts, financial reporting, and liaise with auditors, bankers, and government agencies. Support the finance team in day-to-day operations.
requirements: Degree or Diploma in Accounting/Finance. Minimum 2 years experience. Knowledge of AutoCount or similar accounting software.
